scripts.install:all: npm run install:frontend && npm run install:backend
scripts.typecheck: node scripts/optional-run.js tsconfig.json "tsc --project tsconfig.json --noEmit" "skip typecheck: tsconfig.json not found"
scripts.e2e: node scripts/optional-run.js frontend/package.json "npm --prefix frontend run test:location" "skip e2e: frontend/package.json not found"
scripts.preview: node scripts/optional-run.js frontend/package.json "npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix frontend run preview --" "skip preview: frontend/package.json not found"
scripts.build: node scripts/optional-run.js frontend/package.json "npm --prefix frontend run build" "skip build: frontend/package.json not found"
scripts.test:all: npm run test:backend && npm run test:pricing
